creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is this issue is still relevant to anyone?  If yes, then why will
you need to disable these routers -- you can just refrain from
using them?  Permanently disabling the routers will only make
Exim binary smaller, is that what you need?  If yes, why?

I am a bit picky, because Exim already has many OPTIONS, so
introducing more of them should be justified.
-- 
Eygene Ryabinkin                                        ,,,^..^,,,
